query: Run harness-master in mode docs and synthesize the routed workflow.
expected_skill_contribution: Harness-master preserves orchestration boundaries and routes to harness subrecipes.
expected_behavior: Declares Harness-master mode focus and orchestration decision as first visible output.
Loads orchestrator as only in-session agent.
Routes to the correct harness subrecipe or subrecipes.
Reports validation and Beads status in final handoff.
